Mobile Car Detailing Lexington SC: Prices, Packages & What to Expect (2026)

By Mikah Albertson — updated 2026-03-20

If you've been searching for mobile car detailing in Lexington SC, you're in the right place. Mikah's Auto Detailing is a 5-star rated mobile detailing service based in the Lexington and Columbia area. We bring everything to you — our own water supply, power, professional-grade equipment, and products — so you never have to leave your driveway or office parking lot to get a professional-quality detail.

This guide covers everything Lexington SC vehicle owners need to know: what mobile detailing includes, current 2026 pricing, why the Lake Murray area presents unique challenges for vehicle paint and interiors, and exactly how to book service with us.

Mobile Car Detailing in Lexington SC — What You Get

Mobile car detailing means the detailer comes to your location rather than you dropping your vehicle off at a shop. For Lexington SC residents, that means we service driveways in Lake Murray Shores, office lots near the Lexington Medical District, neighborhoods like Governor's Grant and Reserve at Midway, and anywhere else you park your vehicle within our service area.

We arrive fully self-contained. Our setup includes a freshwater supply, a generator for power, and a full complement of professional detailing equipment including dual-action polishers, steam cleaners, and commercial-grade extractors. You don't need a hose, outlet, or any other accommodations — we handle everything.

What we bring to every mobile detailing appointment in Lexington SC:

  • Self-contained freshwater supply (no hookup needed)
  • Generator for full power independence
  • Professional dual-action polisher for paint work
  • Commercial hot water extractor for interior deep cleaning
  • Steam cleaner for sanitizing surfaces and trim
  • Professional-grade pH-neutral soaps, clay bars, sealants, and dressings

The result is a shop-quality detail at your home or office, without the inconvenience of dropping off and picking up your vehicle.

Lexington SC Detailing Packages & Prices

We keep our pricing straightforward. Every Lexington SC customer gets the same transparent pricing regardless of neighborhood. Below are our standard packages — view the full pricing page for complete details and vehicle-size adjustments.

Package Price Time What's Included
Basic Detail From $225 2–3 hours Exterior hand wash, wheel and tire cleaning, tire dressing, door jamb cleaning, interior vacuum, dashboard and console wipe-down, window cleaning inside and out
Factory Reset (Full Detail) From $400 3–4 hours Everything in Basic, plus clay bar decontamination, paint sealant application, carpet and upholstery extraction, leather conditioning, full trim and plastic restoration, trunk cleaning
Ceramic Coating Custom quote Full day Paint correction prep, professional-grade ceramic coating application, 2–5 year protection; call for pricing specific to your vehicle
Paint Correction Custom quote 4–8 hours Single or multi-stage correction to remove swirl marks, water spots, and light scratches; price based on severity and vehicle size

Pricing adjusts slightly for larger vehicles — full-size trucks and three-row SUVs add $25–$50 to the above figures. We always confirm your total before starting any work, so there are no surprises.

Why Lexington SC Vehicles Need Regular Detailing

Lexington SC sits in the middle of some of the toughest conditions in the country for vehicle finishes. If you're parking outdoors near Lake Murray or anywhere in Lexington County, your paint and interior surfaces are being attacked by multiple environmental factors year-round.

Lake Murray humidity: The proximity to Lake Murray creates elevated humidity levels that persist even through winter. High humidity accelerates oxidation on unprotected paint and promotes mold and mildew growth inside vehicles — particularly in fabric upholstery and carpeting.

Spring pollen season: The Midlands region of South Carolina experiences intense pollen seasons from late February through May. Yellow pine pollen is mildly acidic and, when left on paint surfaces for extended periods, can etch into clear coat. Regular washing and a protective sealant or ceramic coating are your best defenses.

South Carolina UV damage: UV index readings in Lexington routinely reach 10–11 on summer days. Prolonged UV exposure breaks down clear coat, fades interior plastics and leather, and causes dashboard cracking. Paint protection and interior UV treatments slow this degradation significantly.

Red clay contamination: Lexington County's red clay soil is notorious for embedding itself in paint pores, wheel spokes, and brake dust deposits. Standard car washes don't remove embedded clay contamination — that requires a proper clay bar treatment, which is included in our Factory Reset package.

Most Lexington SC vehicle owners benefit from a full detail two to three times per year, with a basic wash-and-dress service in between. Vehicles kept outdoors, used for commuting, or regularly driven on unpaved roads may benefit from more frequent service.

Lexington Neighborhoods We Serve

We provide mobile car detailing throughout Lexington SC and the surrounding area. Our service territory covers all of Lexington County, including:

  • Lake Murray Shores — one of our most active neighborhoods; lakefront living means frequent dust, pollen, and humidity exposure
  • Reserve at Midway — we regularly serve residents in this growing community off Hwy 378
  • Governor's Grant — a frequently requested neighborhood; we typically have availability within 48 hours for this area
  • Secret Cove — lakeside community with strong demand for our ceramic coating and full detail packages
  • Sunset Blvd corridor — commercial and residential stops along this corridor are part of our regular Lexington route
  • Gilbert — we serve Gilbert and surrounding rural Lexington County communities
  • Red Bank — covered as part of our regular Lexington County service days
  • Oak Grove — located near the Lexington/Richland county line; we service this area on both our Lexington and Columbia routes

If you're outside these specific neighborhoods but still in the greater Lexington area, give us a call — we almost certainly cover your location. We also serve Chapin, Irmo, and Cayce as extensions of our Lexington and Columbia routes.

How to Book Mobile Car Detailing in Lexington SC

Booking is straightforward. The fastest way to schedule is to call us directly at (803) 667-8731. We answer during business hours Monday through Saturday, and you can typically get a confirmed appointment within a day or two — same-day service is available when our schedule allows, so if you need a quick turnaround, it's worth calling to ask.

When you call, have the following ready:

  • Your vehicle's year, make, model, and color (color matters for paint correction assessments)
  • A general sense of the vehicle's current condition — light dirt, heavy soiling, pet hair, stains, etc.
  • Your preferred location (home address or business parking lot)
  • Your availability window — we'll match you to the next open slot in your area

Once booked, we'll confirm the appointment the morning of your detail. Our technician arrives at your location with all equipment and begins the pre-inspection walkthrough, noting any existing scratches or damage so there's a clear record before we start. We work through the agreed package and do a final walkthrough with you before we pack up.

For ceramic coating and paint correction quotes, we may ask for photos of the vehicle in advance to provide an accurate estimate — particularly for vehicles with existing paint defects or heavy contamination. This is a free assessment with no obligation.

Ready to schedule? Call (803) 667-8731 or visit our Lexington SC service page for more information about coverage and availability.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does mobile car detailing cost in Lexington SC?

Mobile car detailing in Lexington SC starts at $225 for a Basic Detail (exterior hand wash, interior vacuum, windows, and trim) and $400 for a Factory Reset full detail that includes clay bar decontamination, paint sealant, carpet extraction, and leather conditioning. Larger vehicles like full-size trucks and SUVs add $25–$50. Ceramic coating and paint correction are quoted individually based on vehicle condition.

Do you bring your own water and power for mobile detailing in Lexington SC?

Yes. We arrive fully self-contained with our own freshwater supply and generator. You don't need to provide a hose hookup, outdoor outlet, or anything else. We can detail your vehicle in your driveway, apartment parking lot, or office parking space without any accommodations from you.

Do you offer same-day mobile detailing in Lexington SC?

Same-day mobile detailing in Lexington SC is available depending on our schedule. Call us at (803) 667-8731 before noon and we can often accommodate same-day requests, especially for Basic Detail packages. Factory Reset and ceramic coating appointments may require a day or two of lead time.

What neighborhoods in Lexington SC do you serve?

We serve all of Lexington SC including Lake Murray Shores, Governor's Grant, Reserve at Midway, Secret Cove, Sunset Blvd, Gilbert, Red Bank, and Oak Grove. We also cover Chapin, Irmo, and Cayce as part of our extended service area. If you're unsure whether we cover your location, call (803) 667-8731 and we'll confirm.

How often should Lexington SC residents detail their vehicles?

Most Lexington SC vehicle owners benefit from a full detail two to three times per year due to the area's combination of Lake Murray humidity, intense spring pollen, South Carolina UV exposure, and red clay contamination. Vehicles parked outdoors or driven frequently should be detailed more regularly to protect paint and interior surfaces from these environmental factors.
